text:
Created attachment 210304
Patch to update devel/mill to version 0.5.7.

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update the devel/mill port to version 0.5.7.
The ChangeLog entries are too numerous. Basically a lot of bug fixes, documentation updates and some enhancements.

Kind regards,

Jens
